---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement to Konflux UI
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

Thanks for suggesting an enhancement to [Konflux UI](https://github.com/konflux-ci/konflux-ui) — the web UI for [Konflux](https://github.com/konflux-ci/konflux-ci).

## Problem / motivation

**What problem does this solve?**
<!-- e.g. hard to find failed pipeline runs, missing context when triaging releases -->

**Who benefits?**
<!-- e.g. application owners, namespace admins, release managers -->

**Jira ticket (if any)**
<!-- e.g. KFLUXUI-1234 or link to issues.redhat.com -->

## Proposed solution

**Describe the feature**
<!-- What should the UI do? Include happy path and edge cases. -->

**Where in the UI**
<!-- e.g. Applications, Components, Pipeline runs, Releases, Integration tests, Import, Settings -->

**Mockups / examples** (optional)
<!-- Screenshots, sketches, or links to similar UIs (OpenShift console, other CI tools). -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you considered and why this proposal is preferred. -->

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Impact

**Priority**
- [ ] Critical (blocking my work)
- [ ] High (significantly improves workflow)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (minor enhancement)

**Scope**
- [ ] UI only
- [ ] Requires backend / Konflux API changes
- [ ] Needs documentation or e2e test updates

**Feature flags**
<!-- Should this ship behind a client-side feature flag during development? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Links to docs, Konflux CRDs, related GitHub issues, or workflow steps in Konflux CI. -->
